nts1.d: Tune in to the sound of SUNCUT, boasting a heartfelt selection of some favourite 45’s through to classic bonafide soulful jams.

nts1.n: ALL FRUITS RIPE W/ JACK SAPSED
nts1.d: Ease in to delectations from our host, Jack Sapsed. A sea of sideways sounds: ambient tranquility and psychedelic folk; experimental dub to techno… ALL FRUITS RIPE

Lung Dart take over the NTS airwaves every fourth Monday at 10pm. Playing chopped & screwed, ambient, pop, experimental and more.
http://lungd.art/
Torn Hawk, also known as Luke Wyatt, brings his comedy talk show to the NTS airwaves.

nts1.n: DROWNED BY LOCALS w/ Cheree True
nts1.d:
Drowned By Locals in collaboration with Rhizome Parking Garage presents music made to be listened to in parking garages. Inspired by the parking garage as a symbol of “the inferno of the same” and the agony of uniformity.
From the host: _"WHAT HAPPENS WHEN IT’S OVER AND I CAN’T SPEND TIME WITH YOU ANYMORE W/ CHEREE TRUE: A birthday mix drawn from ten years of conversations with L
Drowned By Locals in collaboration with Rhizome Parking Garage presents music made to be listened to in parking garages. Inspired by the parking garage as"_

nts1.n: Jupiter Presents: Ours by Tarisai Ngangura w/ Immanuel Wilkins
nts1.d: A story by Tarisai Ngangura and a score by Immanuel Wilkins in response to 'Vertigo' (2024) by Turiya Adkins.

nts1.n: Jupiter Presents: Aesop by Ben Okri w/ Kem Kem
Jupiter Presents: Familiar Music by Caleb Azumah Nelson w/ anaiis

nts1.d: RVNG Intl. presents Friends & Fiends, a monthly guest hosted show spotlighting resident artists and heads orbiting the label’s universe of forward-reaching, free, and (generally) fried music.
Rose-tinted hallucinogenic sounds from Astral Vibes' Acid Memories. Illicit dealings in psychedelia of all persuasions. Sit back and enjoy…

nts1.n: The Early Bird Show w/ TROTH
nts1.d: The Early Bird Show - our radio offering for morning people, hosted by a rotating cast of NTS friends and family.

nts1.n: THE NTS BREAKFAST SHOW W/ FLO
nts1.d: Breakfast, in Flo motion - served by Flo Dill, every Monday to Thursday.

nts1.n: CHANNELING W/ IVAN SMAGGHE & NATHAN GREGORY WILKINS
Jupiter Presents: SILVERSCREEN by Eloghosa Osunde w/ Liv.e
ORGANIC MUSIC TOKYO W/ CHEE SHIMIZU
THE EARLY BIRD SHOW W/ SPIRIT BLUE
THE NTS BREAKFAST SHOW W/ FLO

nts2.n: BO NINGEN w/ Josephine Moriko & Sofftronic
nts2.d:
London's infamous psychedelic outfit Bo Ningen takes over the NTS airwaves. Expect anything from video game sounds to noise rock.
From the host: "Bo Ningen March episode by Yuki with special guests Josephine Moriko & Sofftronic from Stockholm"
The notorious Orange County Funk Freaks crew take over the LA studio once a month with their signature brand of boogie, italo, and lowrider funk.
London DJ and producer debbiesthuglife gets the crowd going with electronic, dance, rap and more.
Popstar Benny, DJ & producer based in Atlanta, Georgia

A student and admirer of all forms of music, LA-bred John Tiangco cites the sounds of various public local hip-hop radio as his formative influences. Join him one Monday a month on Rare Species - an hour of music bridging several genres from underground/ indie hip-hop, neo-soul/ RnB, jazz, electronic, rare grooves/samples and psych/alt rock--both old, new and everything in between.

In a vague coalescing of producers and scenes in the late 1990s, the worlds of fuzzy, reverb laden indie rock and drum & bass fused on projects by artists like Bowery Electric and Flying Saucer attack.

FROM THE GREAT DIVIDE HE EMERGED.
ONE FOOT IN THE WRETCHED.
THE OTHER IN THE SUBLIME. 
FORWARD CLUB FOR A BACKWARD ERA. 
LIVING WILL KILL HIM. 
LIVING GATLATO.

Amila, the founder of Altered Soul Experiment brings monthly transmissions of soul, boogie, disco and his Search For Peace series, covering soothing and cerebral ambient jazz and fourth world selections.

Exploring the cinematic universe inhabited by Japanese director Hirokazu Kore-eda, master of shomin-geki, the technique of magnifying small but significant human moments on film as opposed to grand dramatic conflict and tension. 
“I’ve learned to value ordinary life. And I still have a wish to portray that.”

Lamin Fofana is an artist and musician currently located in New York. His music contrasts the reality of our world with what’s beyond, and explores questions of movement, migration, alienation and belonging. His releases include Works In Metal, Here Lies Universality, Unsettling Scores, and The Open Boat. Fofana is the founder of the imprint Black Studies and phase4.zip
Step into The Head Zone - one hour of musical selections from the mind of Moon Duo's Ripley Johnson.

nts2.n: PLAY IT AS IT LATHES W/ ZACH COWIE (R)
Chasing echoes w/ TOHÉ COMMARET + ARIANE KIKS
Up The Beanstalk: Silent Spring part 2
Como La Flor w/ Jazmin - PURO SENTIMENTAL (R)
No Earth Tones w/ Ben Block (R)

subtle.d: Saraphim (aka RNS & RDubz) are two Essex based Producer/DJ’s currently focused on Dubstep & the 140 spectrum, mixing ethnical and grime influences into their music. You can expect anything from deep and melodic meditative vibes to high energy driven music.
London based DJ who enjoys exploring the darker, bassier corners of Jungle, Breaks, Techno and Drum & Bass, especially when it is laced with a bit of acid.

subtle.n: The Ice Box Sessions with Frigid

subtle.d: Hailing from northern Italy, STANDARD is a collective of artists, DJs and producers that aims at the promotion of bass music: Garage, UK Funky, Breaks, Leftfield Bass, Leftfield Techno, Dubstep, everything in between and beyond. They focus on the Italian Bass scene, showcasing new up-and-coming artists as well as established talents from all over the peninsula.

Oddkut is a producer & DJ hailing from Balakovo City, Russia. He's part of the Russian collective "United Gang" who are a Moscow-based community of local musicians, DJ's and promoters teamed up by their genuine love & interest in UK underground music, "TAЭT VREMYA" art group and the creator of the Moscow parties "Judder".

Kishan is a DJ and Producer currently based in London. Actively involved in the music scene already, he produces and mixes a wide range of genres including UK Garage, Drum & Bass, House, Disco and Afrobeat.

subtle.n: Out of Phase With Sam Ling

subtle.d: Sessions w/ Amy B is an underground multi-genre music show, showcasing the most prolific guests from all corners of the music industry.

Originally linking up in Wellington and playing shows with the Breaking Beats crew, Swampman and Zero Crumbs have reunited – bringing their smooth mixing and flexible selections to East London. 

In their monthly show, the pair explore the deep, dark, and soulful ends of DNB. Expect fresh underground tunes, deep cut classics, and a bit of banter in Kiwi accents.

subtle.n: Dun Roamin w/ Tomi From Brockley

subtle.d:
Midlands born, London based producer and DJ influenced by UK funky, broken techno, garage and early dubstep. 

Has released on Keysound recordings, RKS, eatmybeat, ec2a, Durkle Disco and Dimsum records

dublab.n: Echo Park Film Center - Optical Track
Jennifer Herrema and Kurt Midness - The Banana Question

dublab.d: “Dying Songs focuses on melancholic electronic music but isn’t limited to that. Sometimes it gets dark, sometimes I try to mix techno awkwardly, sometimes i get nostalgic… I like stuff that’s dreamy, ghostly, pretty and sad. I’ll try out new productions of my own, as well. I’m keeping it pretty open and we’ll see how it evolves.” – Jimmy

dublab.n: George Jensen and Heavy Hymns - Quietudes
Daddy Differently and Dirty Dave - Things of Life
dublab.d: It’s the simple things isn’t it? The little things of life. Good food, sunshine, no traffic, dark coffee, 72˚ breeze, telephone off the hook and music every Friday morning a la Daddy Differently & Dirty Dave.
Peak Oil records presents ‘tipping point’; a monthly journey through the record collections of brian and brion. Leaving no good genre unturned, enjoy two hours of esoterica, conversation and guests.

dublab.n: Ill Camille x Jesse Fairfax - The Sweeter the Juice
Greg Belson - Divine Chord Gospel Show
